text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The concert moves a fan to tears. It<n>would seem
that Mihono Bourbon's<n>emotions got across.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She delivered the kind of moving<n>performance she
once saw Smart<n>Falcon give. The team gets a
boost in<n>morale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've heard from more and more<n>people who
see their own dreams in<n>the goal we're working
towards. Our<n>project, however, is not without its
detractors.
